title: Irish Lamb Miso Casserole
description: A hearty lamb casserole with a rich miso glaze, perfect for a cold Irish evening.
instructions: Season lamb with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Brown lamb cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove lamb from pot and set aside.
Add more oil to pot if necessary, then sauté onion and garlic until softened.
Stir in miso paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Gradually add beef broth, whisking continuously, and bring to a simmer.
Return lamb to pot, cover, and transfer to preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until lamb is tender.
If using heavy cream, stir it in during the last 10 minutes of cooking.
Serve hot, garnished with parsley if desired.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
